hyperedges.label: Oracle Abstraction: OracleRouter routes IOracle calls to ChainlinkOracle or StorkOracle
Multi-Vault Staking Registration: stQEUROFactory deploys stQEUROToken proxy per vaultId with self-registration from QuantillonVault
Yield Distribution Pipeline: AaveVault harvests to YieldShift which routes to stQEURO token per vaultId
HedgerPool Logic, Validation, and Error Libraries Trio
Yield Distribution Subsystem (TWAP + Holding Period + Validation)
Oracle Abstraction Layer: IOracle, IChainlinkOracle, IStorkOracle
Secure Upgrade Subsystem: ISecureUpgradeable + ITimelockUpgradeable + multi-sig
